expectations.text: Explains that colab exec -f reads local files (relative to CWD), not remote VM files
expectations.evidence: Lines 5-7: "colab exec -f reads a Python file from your local filesystem and sends it to the VM for execution. It does not run files that already exist on the VM."

expectations.text: Shows correct command: colab exec -f script.py (without /content/ prefix)
Mentions that working directory on the VM is /content/
expectations.evidence: Lines 7, 13, 17, 30: multiple references to /content/ as the VM working directory

expectations.text: Mentions stdin pipe as alternative: echo 'code' | colab exec
